case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. MARCUS ROSS

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: RUCH, TONY SUBSTITUTED FOR TORRES, FRANCISCO G. AS ATTORNEY FOR SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-22-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-11-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-03-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
